headline: NewBird AI enters a consolidating, capital-intensive, 14-16%-margin GPUaaS market as a sub-scale (~$2.75M lease via QumulusAI), single-supplier/single-financier micro-entrant with no moat, customers, or differentiation vs CoreWeave/hyperscalers; legacy footwear (sold to AXNY for $39M) had already lost share to On & Hoka.
